name: gene-prioritizer-ai
description: Research/education gene-prioritization decision-support tool. Not a diagnostic device.

scripts.test:e2e: echo "[phase-1] Playwright e2e suite is not implemented until Phase 8. This script is a placeholder so CI wiring is stable; it intentionally exits 0." && exit 0
scripts.db:generate: echo "[phase-1] Prisma is introduced in Phase 2. Placeholder no-op." && exit 0
scripts.db:migrate: echo "[phase-1] Prisma is introduced in Phase 2. Placeholder no-op." && exit 0
scripts.db:studio: echo "[phase-1] Prisma is introduced in Phase 2. Placeholder no-op." && exit 0
scripts.data:download-hpo: echo "[phase-1] HPO ingestion is introduced in Phase 3. Placeholder no-op." && exit 0
scripts.data:build-hpo: echo "[phase-1] HPO ingestion is introduced in Phase 3. Placeholder no-op." && exit 0
scripts.data:seed: echo "[phase-1] Seed data is introduced in Phase 2. Placeholder no-op." && exit 0
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:generate && npm run data:download-hpo && npm run data:build-hpo && npm run data:seed
